title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
